title: Packs / Xananode Canonical / Assets / Raw / Protocol / Examples / Custom Extension Substrate / Schemas / README
summary: packs/xananode-canonical/assets/raw/protocol/examples/custom-extension-substrate/schemas/README.md is preserved as a raw Core SDK source artifact in the XanaNode Core SDK substrate.
content:
# Custom Schemas

These schema registry files define local extensions to XanaNode Core.

Custom types should be:

- namespaced
- described in human-readable language
- versioned
- mappable to a core type when possible
- safe to preserve even when another implementation does not fully understand them
